rationale: Gold and Chimera concentration risk justify testing whether TECL behaves differently when tech-risk correlation regimes shift.
expected_failure_mode: fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence before promotion
stop_conditions: candidate family remains crowded or redundant
quick grid has no candidate worth full certification
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
correlation-regime proxy is redundant with QQQ same-parameter behavior
candidate improves portability but loses TECL share accumulation
